business_goal: Create educational content to help reduce first-90-day churn by showing customers how to get value from underused features.
target_market: Customers in their first 90 days who have logged in fewer than 5 times
current_context: Support team flagged that customers who don't set up automated workflows in week 1 are 3x more likely to churn.
constraints: Content should be usable in onboarding emails and in-app tooltips, not just social media.

past_campaign_performance.notes: Highest-performing automated email, but doesn't mention workflow automation specifically
